  1. org.springframework.ai.chat.client
  2. ChatClientRequest

Uses of Record Class
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.ChatClientRequest

Packages that use ChatClientRequest
Package
Description
org.springframework.ai.chat.cache.semantic
 
org.springframework.ai.chat.client
Chat client API.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor
Provides classes for advising chat clients.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.api
Provides the API for chat client advisors.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.observation
Provides the API for chat client advisors observations.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.toolsearch
Tool Search Tool Advisor package for dynamic tool discovery and search capabilities.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.vectorstore
Spring AI chat client advisors package.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.observation
Provides classes for observing chat data.
org.springframework.ai.rag.advisor
 
org.springframework.ai.test.chat.client.advisor
Test support classes for ChatClient advisor integration tests.

  • Uses of ChatClientRequest in org.springframework.ai.chat.cache.semantic

    Methods in org.springframework.ai.chat.cache.semantic that return ChatClientRequest
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ChatClientRequest
    SemanticCacheAdvisor.before(ChatClientRequest request, AdvisorChain advisorChain)
    Not used for semantic cache advisor since we override adviseCall/adviseStream.
    Methods in org.springframework.ai.chat.cache.semantic with parameters of type ChatClientRequest
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ChatClientResponse
    SemanticCacheAdvisor.adviseCall(ChatClientRequest request, CallAdvisorChain chain)
    Handles synchronous chat requests by checking the cache before proceeding.
    reactor.core.publisher.Flux<ChatClientResponse>
    SemanticCacheAdvisor.adviseStream(ChatClientRequest request, StreamAdvisorChain chain)
    Handles streaming chat requests by checking the cache before proceeding.
    ChatClientRequest
    SemanticCacheAdvisor.before(ChatClientRequest request, AdvisorChain advisorChain)
    Not used for semantic cache advisor since we override adviseCall/adviseStream.

    Logic to be executed before the rest of the advisor chain is called.
    ChatClientResponse
    CallAdvisorChain.nextCall(ChatClientRequest chatClientRequest)
    Invokes the next CallAdvisor in the CallAdvisorChain with the given request.
    reactor.core.publisher.Flux<ChatClientResponse>
    StreamAdvisorChain.nextStream(ChatClientRequest chatClientRequest)
    Invokes the next StreamAdvisor in the StreamAdvisorChain with the given request.
